steps.title: Identify the pronoun's target
steps.content: The blank is a pronoun referring to customers — the people being asked. Customers is plural and third person.

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content:
A pronoun must agree with its antecedent in number and person. They is the plural, third-person pronoun matching customers.
The other choices fail: one is singular and indefinite, you is second person, and it is singular and neuter.
That matches Choice A — they.
